testcase.name: testBugCondition StarRatingInterfaceBug

failure.message: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "com.college.event.model.User.getId()" because "this.testUser" is null

testcase.name: testBugCondition_StarRatingStartsEmptyAndShowsPopup()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: STAR RATING EMPTY STATE BUG CONFIRMED! Dashboard star rating interface should start empty (no stars selected). Expected: star.empty class or selectedRating = 0 initialization. Found: No empty star state initialization in dashboard. This confirms the bug - star rating doesn't start empty as required.

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: STAR RATING EMPTY STATE BUG CONFIRMED! Dashboard star rating interface should start empty (no stars selected). Expected: star.empty class or selectedRating = 0 initialization. Found: No empty star state initialization in dashboard. This confirms the bug - star rating doesn't start empty as required. at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionUtils.fail(AssertionUtils.java:38) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.fail(Assertions.java:138) at com.college.event.StarRatingInterfaceBugTest.testBugCondition_StarRatingStartsEmptyAndShowsPopup(StarRatingInterfaceBugTest.java:323) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

testcase.name: testBugCondition_StarRatingInterface_DashboardContext()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: STAR RATING INTERFACE BUG CONFIRMED! Dashboard.html is missing star rating interface elements. Expected: .rating-star or .rating-input classes for star selection. Found: Neither rating-star nor rating-input classes exist in dashboard. This confirms the bug - no star rating interface in dashboard context.

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: STAR RATING INTERFACE BUG CONFIRMED! Dashboard.html is missing star rating interface elements. Expected: .rating-star or .rating-input classes for star selection. Found: Neither rating-star nor rating-input classes exist in dashboard. This confirms the bug - no star rating interface in dashboard context. at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionUtils.fail(AssertionUtils.java:38) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.fail(Assertions.java:138) at com.college.event.StarRatingInterfaceBugTest.testBugCondition_StarRatingInterface_DashboardContext(StarRatingInterfaceBugTest.java:235) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

testcase.name: testBugCondition_StarRatingAvailableInDashboardNotJustReviewBoard()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: STAR RATING DASHBOARD CONTEXT BUG CONFIRMED! Star rating functionality exists in review-board.html but is missing from dashboard.html. Users should be able to rate events from the main dashboard, not just the review board. Expected: Star rating interface integrated into dashboard context. Found: Star rating only available in separate review-board page. This confirms the bug - star rating interface is not available in dashboard context.

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: STAR RATING DASHBOARD CONTEXT BUG CONFIRMED! Star rating functionality exists in review-board.html but is missing from dashboard.html. Users should be able to rate events from the main dashboard, not just the review board. Expected: Star rating interface integrated into dashboard context. Found: Star rating only available in separate review-board page. This confirms the bug - star rating interface is not available in dashboard context. at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionUtils.fail(AssertionUtils.java:38) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.fail(Assertions.java:138) at com.college.event.StarRatingInterfaceBugTest.testBugCondition_StarRatingAvailableInDashboardNotJustReviewBoard(StarRatingInterfaceBugTest.java:386) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)
